## Summary

Enforces the six-part diagnostic canon at two layers: (1) a SIPOC kick-backward enrichment step that retries incomplete recommendations with a gold-standard example prompt, and (2) a workbench admission gate that withholds cards missing diagnostic fields from the author. Creates the Sister Dream Ledger as the gold-standard exemplar.

## Scope

**Touched:**
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/types.ts` — `symptom` now required on recommendations
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Synthesis.ts` — `buildSymptomFromContext()` fallback
- `lib/revision/diagnosticEnrichment.ts` — NEW: enrichment retry module (tells LLM WHAT is missing, WHY, shows gold standard)
- `lib/revision/opportunityLedger.ts` — diagnostic enrichment step before hydration; `rationale_contaminated` admin action
- `lib/revision/reviseAdmissionGate.ts` — six-part diagnostic completeness gate at workbench admission
- `docs/phase-0-warmup/SIPOC_INPUT_OUTPUT_QUALITY_GATES.md` — added diagnostic metrics + kick-backward documentation
- `docs/gold-standards/sister-revise-queue-dream-ledger.md` — NEW: 10 gold-standard opportunities with full diagnostic
- Test fixtures updated across 8 test files

**Out of scope:** No changes to internal enums (must/should/could stay), no evaluation re-runs, no UI changes.

## Tests Updated

- `__tests__/lib/revision/opportunityLedger.test.ts` — fixtures enriched with diagnostic fields (22/22 pass)
- `__tests__/lib/revision/reviseAdmissionGate.test.ts` — workbench fixture enriched (6/6 pass)
- Pipeline tests updated for required `symptom` field
- Full suite: 363 suites pass, 3078 tests pass, 0 failures

## Rollback Plan

Revert this commit; the admission gate and enrichment step are additive (no data migration). The `symptom` required field has `buildSymptomFromContext()` as fallback so no runtime crash on legacy data.

## Affected Workflows

- Evaluation → Revise handoff: enrichment step now runs before hydration
- Workbench admission: cards without diagnostic fields are withheld

N/A — no schema changes.

N/A — no RLS changes.

N/A — no schema changes.

## Unauthorized Input Sources

- `diagnosticEnrichment.ts` receives only internal pipeline data (opportunity fields from Pass 3)
- No external user input enters the enrichment prompt

## Internal Process Leakage

Confirmed: no internal process details exposed. The enrichment prompt is internal LLM-to-LLM communication.

## Input → Action → Output

1. Pass 3 produces recommendation → diagnostic completeness check
2. Missing fields → enrichment prompt (WHAT/WHY/gold standard) → LLM retry → validated fields
3. Enriched opportunity → hydration → workbench admission gate → author sees complete card

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

- `[DiagnosticEnrichment] N enriched, M failed` logged for operational telemetry
- Admission gate reasons (`DIAGNOSTIC_MISSING_*`) visible in admin/debug views only

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

- One additional LLM call per opportunity missing diagnostic fields (bounded: only runs when fields are absent)
- Enrichment runs BEFORE hydration so it does not add latency to the candidate generation path when diagnostics are already complete

## Latency Impact

Minimal: enrichment only triggers for recommendations with missing diagnostic fields. When Pass 3 produces complete diagnostics (expected after prompt improvements), this path is skipped entirely.

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: no

Pass selection (check exactly one):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [x] Pass 3

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

## Contract Integrity

- `symptom` required in type enforces diagnostic completeness at compile time
- `diagnosticCompletenessReasons()` validates at runtime
- `runWorkbenchAdmissionGate()` withholds incomplete cards at display time
- SIPOC doc updated with formal input/output metrics per canon

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence. It adds a retry mechanism that IMPROVES output quality by giving the LLM specific feedback about what's missing and why, plus a gold-standard example to match.

## Latency Evidence

N/A — enrichment is conditional and additive; no degradation to the normal path.

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_none — no anomalies. Enrichment is fail-safe (if LLM retry fails, opportunity enters `needs_diagnostic_enrichment` blocked state rather than passing garbage through).

## Risk

Low risk: enrichment is additive (doesn't remove existing functionality), admission gate is additive (withholds rather than crashes), all tests pass.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- If OPENAI_API_KEY is missing, enrichment is skipped (graceful degradation)
- Admission gate may withhold more cards than before if legacy data lacks diagnostic fields — this is intentional (prefer withhold over garbage)

No-Pipeline-Impact: false — adds enrichment step before hydration and diagnostic gate at admission.
